title: UR1 Robot Vacuum Cleaner with Mop,Robotic Vacuum with 5000Pa Super Suction,180min,Ultra-Slim Robot Vacuum with Auto Carpet Boost,APP/Remote/Voice Control,Ideal for Carpets/Hard Floors/Pet Hair
features: 🌪️【𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝟓𝟎𝟎𝟎𝐏𝐚 𝐒𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 & 𝟑-𝐢𝐧-𝟏 𝐕𝐚𝐜𝐮𝐮𝐦 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐌𝐨𝐩 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐛𝐨】 Reclaim Your 'Me Time'. Experience a deeper clean with industry-leading 5000Pa suction power. The UR1 robot vacuum effortlessly lifts pet hair, crumbs, and deeply embedded dust from both hard floors and carpets. The robot vacuum cleaner innovative 3-in-1 design allows you to sweep, vacuum, and mop simultaneously, leaving your entire home spotless in just one pass.

🐕【𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐨-𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐩𝐞𝐭 𝐁𝐨𝐨𝐬𝐭 & 𝐓𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐥𝐞-𝐅𝐫𝐞𝐞 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧】 Tired of fur tumbleweeds? So is the UR1 robot vacuum and mop. UR1 robotic vacuum cleaner intelligently senses carpets and instantly ramps up power to dig out embedded pet hair. The specialized V-shaped anti-tangle roller of the vacuum cleaner actively prevents frustrating hair wrap, while the 450ml large dustbin and HEPA filter trap 99.9% of dander.

✨【𝐔𝐥𝐭𝐫𝐚-𝐒𝐥𝐢𝐦 𝟐.𝟗𝟗" 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧 & 𝟏𝟖𝟎𝐦𝐢𝐧 𝐄𝐱𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐑𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞】 Reach where others can't! With a super-slim 2.99-inch profile, UR1 robotic vacuum seamlessly glides under beds, sofas, and cabinets to eliminate hidden dirt. Powered by a high-capacity 2600mAh battery, the vacuum and mop combo delivers up to 180 minutes of continuous cleaning, covering an impressive 2100 sq.ft. on a single charge to tidy your whole home.

🔋【4 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐥 𝐖𝐚𝐲𝐬 & 𝐒𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐨-𝐑𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐠𝐞】 Take full control your way. Operate UR1 vacuum robot via Voice Command (Alexa), Smartphone App (Smartlife or Tuya App), Remote Control, or Physical Buttons. The remote offers simple, Wi-Fi-free operation, ideal for seniors. The vacuum robot and mop automatically docks and recharges when battery is low(≤15%), ensuring it's always ready for your next cleaning task.

📱【𝐆𝐲𝐫𝐨-𝐍𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐠𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 & 𝐐𝐮𝐢𝐞𝐭, 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐡𝐞𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐂𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠】 Efficiently cleans every inch without the noise. Advanced Gyro-Navigation of the robotic vacuums ensures methodical full-home coverage without missing spots. With 4 cleaning modes (Auto, Spot, Edge, Random) and sub-50dB quiet operation, UR1 vacuum robot mop works diligently in the background without disturbing your peace.

📩【𝐋𝐢𝐟𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞 𝐓𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐧𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥 𝐒𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭】 uninell places great importance on product quality and customer satisfaction. We promise to provide a 2-year warranty and lifetime technical support. Our customer service team will respond within 24 hours. If you have any questions or suggestions, please feel free to let us know. Thank you for choosing uninell.
